title: Archaic Tooth
description: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] a starter card with an ancient version.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: This relic transforms one of five specific starter cards into its ancient version when obtained: Bash → Break, Neutralize → Suppress, Unleash → Protector, Falling Star → Meteor Shower, or Dualcast → Quadcast. The relic will automatically select a compatible card from the player's deck if available.
